svg.text: parser.js · runner.js · memory.js · git.js · telegram.js · email-poller.js · reply.js
gemini uses -p flag instead of stdin — prevents interactive/agentic hang
cloneLocks{} is an in-memory promise per repo name — prevents parallel clone race
allowUnsafeSshCommand: true required for simple-git with custom SSH keys
GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE is hardcoded into SPAWN_ENV, not left to .env
git ops auto-inject gitLog(repo, 5) as context into the next AI prompt
